summary: Night-Based Booking Calendar Visual Blocking - All 7 features VERIFIED. Hard blocking with pointer-events:none and opacity:0.5 working correctly. Checkout days (5, 17, 25) have teal dot indicator and are clickable. Zero toast policy confirmed - UI prevents invalid selections.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement (minor)

critical_code_review_comments: BlockingDayButton correctly applies pointer-events:none and opacity-40 for blocked nights
NightBasedDayContent shows teal dot (w-2 h-2 bg-teal-500) for checkout days
isHardBlocked logic correctly combines blockedNightsSet check with past date check
data-blocked and data-checkout-day attributes enable testability
Teal color scheme (bg-teal-600, bg-teal-100) used consistently for range selection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual blocking fully verified. BlockingDayButton component applies hard blocking via CSS: opacity-40 + pointer-events:none + line-through for blocked nights. Checkout days show split visual with teal dot indicator.

blocked_dates_not_clickable.evidence: Blocked days have pointer-events: none - clicking does not select

checkout_days_teal_dot.evidence: Days 5, 17, 25 have small teal dot indicator (bg-teal-500 w-2 h-2)

checkout_days_clickable.evidence: Days 5, 17, 25 have pointer-events: auto, opacity: 1 - fully clickable

range_selection_teal_highlight.evidence: Selected range uses bg-teal-600 for start/end, bg-teal-100 for middle

price_breakdown_appears.evidence: After selecting Apr 5-7: shows 'Rental cost (2 nights): ฿70,000', service fee, total

no_toast_for_unavailable.evidence: Force-clicking blocked date shows NO toast - UI prevents selection via CSS

console_output_highlights: Blocked day CSS - pointer-events: none, opacity: 0.5
NO TOAST APPEARED - UI prevents invalid selection (good!)
After blocked click - date field text: Check-in — Check-out (unchanged)
Checkout day CSS - pointer-events: auto, opacity: 1
After checkout day click - selection: 5 Apr — ...
